title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York, NY (with Tel Aviv HQ collaboration)
description: Finout is hiring a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its go-to-market engine as it enters its 2026 growth phase. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling RevOps beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Experience with globally distributed teams collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ is required. Finout has raised over $85M and serves brands like The New York Times and Wiz.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps experience exceeds 7+ requirement, proven scaling expertise aligns perfectly with $30M+ ARR mandate, deep Salesforce expertise is core requirement, and global/Tel Aviv collaboration directly matches Omri's location preferences and Israeli background.
ai_opener: Omri, I noticed Finout is scaling into 2026 and building out the RevOps backbone from Tel Aviv—your 15 years in B2B SaaS RevOps and track record scaling operations through hypergrowth phases makes this a natural fit. Given your familiarity with Israeli tech hubs and global team dynamics, plus your Salesforce depth, this Head of RevOps role seems purpose-built for your background.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Instrumentl, a YC-backed hyper-growth SaaS startup serving 5,000+ nonprofit clients, seeks a RevOps Manager to own the technical infrastructure powering its revenue engine. This builder role involves architecting the CRM data model, integrating data sources, and leading technical implementation of AI tools across sales processes. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue/Sales/Marketing Operations or GTM Systems at a B2B SaaS company, strong technical skills (SQL, workflows, APIs), hands-on CRM administration (HubSpot preferred), and data architecture/integration experience. Familiarity with enrichment vendors (Clearbit, ZoomInfo) and intent data providers is a plus.
score_reason: Exceptional alignment: RevOps Manager role matches Omri's core expertise in revenue operations and GTM infrastructure. YC-backed B2B SaaS with AI-native processes, CRM architecture demands, and data integration requirements are precisely his wheelhouse—HubSpot admin, pipeline forecasting, and technical systems leadership are his strengths.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building revenue engines for B2B SaaS, and Instrumentl's approach to nonprofits through AI-powered sales infrastructure caught my attention. Your RevOps Manager brief around CRM data modeling and intent data integration is exactly the kind of technical GTM architecture I've scaled multiple times. Would love to explore how my experience architecting Salesforce/HubSpot ecosystems and leading data-driven forecasting could accelerate your growth.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong.io is hiring a RevOps Manager for Territory Strategy & Operations to redesign territory models and processes for global scalability. Responsibilities include partnering with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory compositions, analyzing historical performance and account data for segmentation, supporting GTM planning cycles, and maintaining accurate territory mapping in CRM systems. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models and segmentation, strong analytical skills with Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Retool), Salesforce proficiency, and experience with territory management tools like Fullcast, Pigment, or Anaplan.
score_reason: Excellent match for a senior RevOps executive—territory strategy, B2B SaaS GTM optimization, Salesforce proficiency, and analytical rigor across pipeline forecasting are core to Omri's background. Remote global role with strategic scope aligns perfectly with his seniority level and expertise in scaling revenue operations.

Having spent 15+ years building GTM infrastructure and pipeline forecasting models in B2B SaaS, I've learned that territory design is where strategy meets execution, and I'd be excited to discuss how to architect models that actually stick and scale across your global regions.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo, an AI research platform used by global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange, is hiring a GTM Engineer to replace manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered automations as it scales toward 20x revenue in 2026. The role involves coding, shipping, and iterating on internal tools that make the GTM team more effective—building lead scoring models that learn, attribution pipelines, customer onboarding flows, and AI agents that eliminate hours of manual work weekly. With 15+ years building revenue systems in B2B SaaS, I've seen firsthand how the right operational infrastructure compounds value. I'd be curious if there's an opportunity here for RevOps leadership as you scale, or if the GTM Engineer role involves building strategic systems beyond pure code.
